/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libcustom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/custom_messages/msg/slow__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/copperbottoms/code/Copperbottoms/ros_ws/build/custom_messages:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcustom_messages__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
